import io
import string
import list

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    if i != idx
      let v = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(val)
        val
      when None
        0
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let first_val = match remaining.get(0)
    when Some(fv)
      fv
    when None
      0
    end
    mut min_val = first_val
    mut min_idx = 0
    mut i = 1
    while i < remaining.len()
      let cur = match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(cv)
        cv
      when None
        0
      end
      if cur < min_val
        min_val = cur
        min_idx = i
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    remaining = remove_at(remaining, min_idx)
  end
  sorted
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let v = match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn print_result(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Unit
  if xs.len() == 0
    print("empty")
  else
    mut s = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < xs.len()
      let v = match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if i == 0
        s = "#{v}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{v}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print(s)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  let inter = intersect(a, b)
  let sorted = sort_ints(inter)
  print_result(sorted)
end
